clarity.notes: The 8-slide sequence moves from problem to method, pipeline, experiments, results, and discussion with source trace labels on every slide.

hierarchy.notes: Each slide has one dominant headline and supporting panels; quantitative slides are dense but separated into table and chart regions.

typography.notes: Academic serif headings and system body text remain readable on the 1920x1080 canvas; numeric tables use tabular monospace styling.

motion.notes: Navigation is intentionally minimal for a paper deck: keyboard controls, persistent slide position, and progress state.

brand.notes: The visual system is restrained, paper-like, method-first, and avoids decorative claims or non-paper content.
